title: Asserts Ownership and Agency in the Conflict
location: Face-off with opposing holders of the Cuatroblade and Mystical Cuatro
situation: Under pressure, Manus states clear possession and intent, signaling that he understands the stakes and will act decisively to reclaim what is tied to Roz.
knows: Others recognize his connection to the artifact
He must take active control rather than remain reactive
The Cuatroblade and Mystical Cuatro are key to confronting his adversaries
does_not_know: The full power or limits of the Mystical Cuatro
All hidden motives of the opposing side
The exact cost of reclaiming Roz's heart
